query: Measure coverage and tell me if we pass the gate.
expected_behavior: Runs dotnet test with XPlat Code Coverage to produce a Cobertura report
Runs scripts/coverage-gate.mjs to decide the gate deterministically (not by eyeballing)
Reports overall and domain branch coverage vs the 70%/80% thresholds
Raises [GATE] when a scope is below its threshold

query: Check this coverage report against the gate.
expected_behavior: Computes overall 73% (>=70 pass) and domain 85% (>=80 pass) → PASS

query: Our domain layer dropped — does it still pass?
expected_behavior: Detects domain branch coverage 65% < 80% and fails the gate (exit 1)
Names the under-covered domain package to target first
Recommends not merging until the gate passes
